skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Gather powerful fire magic to launch it towards an enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Casting Time: 0.5 seconds

skills.name: Fire Wall
skills.description: Creates a wall of flames that continuously damages approaching enemies. Attacked enemies are knocked back.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x CaptionRatio
Discover more
Respiratory Conditions
Doll
Maps
Fire Walls: 8

skills.name: Enchant Fire
skills.description: Attacks enemy nearby by the explosion of Fire property when killing enemy or boss with Fire Property during the Enchant Fire.

skills.name: Fire Pillar
skills.description: Summons a pillar of fire to inflict damage on enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Duration: 10 seconds

skills.name: Hell Breath
skills.description: Attack by continuously fuming fire towards enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Channeling time: 10 seconds
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Number of targets: CaptionRatio3
Consumes CaptionRatio SP per second

skills.name: Flame Ground
skills.description: Creates a magic circle of flames around you. Deals continuous Fire damage to enemies within the magic circle.(Does not apply to flying monsters.)
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor per 1 second: SkillFactor %
Target: CaptionRatio2
Duration: 8 seconds

skills.name: Prominence
skills.description: Summons Prominence. The summoned Prominence roams within the designated location, inflicting damage to targets.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Target: CaptionRatio2

attributes.name: Fireball: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fireball] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fire Wall: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fire Wall] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Enchant Fire: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Enchant Fire] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fire Pillar: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fire Pillar] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hell Breath: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Hell Breath] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fireball: Burn Debuff
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Fireball] have a 10% chance per attribute level to receive Fire damage for 5 seconds

* [Burn] damage is based on character's INT

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Fire Wall: Additional Damage Buff
attributes.description:
* Increases additional damage of allies per attribute level in proportion to INT for 5 seconds when the caster and the party members step on [Fire Wall]

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Hell Breath: Knockback
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Hell Breath] have a 10% chance per attribute level of being knocked back

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Enchant Fire: Decreased Fire Property Resistance
attributes.description:
* Using [Enchant Fire] reduces Fire-property resistance by 10% per attribute level on enemies within a range of 150

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Flame Ground: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Flame Ground] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Flame Ground: Diffusion
attributes.description:
* Inflicts the [Heat] debuff for 10 seconds on enemies within range of [Flame Ground]

* [Heat] reduces Fire-property resistance by 50 per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: [Arts] Prominence: Flame Jewel
attributes.description:
* Upon using [Prominence], a red flame will rotate the caster for 30 seconds

* Red flame attacks the enemy with 2 consecutive hits

* Minimum activation duration applied as 0.5 seconds per target hit

attributes.name: [Arts] Fire Wall: Crossfire
attributes.description: * Doubles the number of hits of [Fire Wall], and it is created in a cross pattern upon use

attributes.name: [Arts] Fireball: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Fireball] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Fire Wall: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Fire Wall] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Fire Pillar] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Hell Breath] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Flame Ground: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Flame Ground] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Prominence: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Prominence] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hell Breath: Napalm
attributes.description: * Decrease channeling time and Strike gap by 50% instead of attacking a single target
